title: New Old Netherrack
description: Bringing back the style of classic netherrack.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212f6584b12722811f46dc37ba4ebf2d32854b2d.png)

This resource pack will recolor the modern netherrack texture so that it more closely resembles the classic texture from Programmer Art.

For those who prefer the old texture but want to continue playing with the current style.

# Comparison

![Nether Wastes comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HRtbZGNu/images/81c09ef1ca0e44197fe50419c32d6ff499d96899.png)
